body: I hug her goodbye, but neither of us is ready to release the other immediately. It’s not long enough to be dramatic, but long enough to communicate to the other, “Please stay! Somehow!” When we finally pull apart, we both take a tiny step back, as if distance might help. We look deeply in each others eyes and any assistance that came with the slight distance fades. I take her hand, kiss it, and say goodbye, then with so much effort, I turn away, not letting her hand drop from mine, savoring as much touch as possible, until she is too far for my arm to reach. And my mind whispers, Soon…
